\noindent We sample 50 units from the \ttblue{salaries}
dataset by using the \ttblue{sample()} function.

\par\addvspace{\topsep}

# RNGkind() is R-specific; NumPy RNG is used in Python
n = 50
np.random.seed(12345)
sample1 = salaries.iloc[np.random.choice(N, size=n, 
replace=False), :]
sample1.head()
\end{Verbatim}
